Author: mole99
Content: You need to set [`SYNTH_EXCLUDED_CELL_FILE`](https://librelane.readthedocs.io/en/latest/reference/common_pdk_vars.html) to point to your exclude file.

Author: mole99
Content: You can find the current one in `gf180mcu/gf180mcuD/libs.tech/librelane/gf180mcu_fd_sc_mcu7t5v0/synth_exclude.cells`

Author: logic_destroyer
Content: it is possible to overlay it?

Author: logic_destroyer
Content: I don't want to touch the gf180mcu repo

Author: mole99
Content: No, unfortunately not. Make a copy of the file in your repository and add the line.
